review_questions: Does reuse depend on semantic role, data, operations, state, hierarchy, interaction, constraints, and trace refs rather than visual similarity?
Do reuse_scope and downstream pattern refs consume only canonical element ids, approved interaction messages, or approved exceptions?
Does information presentation cover every approved interaction message and reject unknown message refs?
Are equivalent information mode differences blocked unless an approved consistency exception covers the allowed modes?
Does the candidate avoid layout carrier, containment, ordering, width, height, scroll, z-axis, locks, repository code, and prior candidate mutation?
